# terrible_community_general_ocapi_command (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `baseuri` (String) Base URI of OOB controller.
- `category` (String) Category to execute on OOB controller.
- `command` (String) Command to execute on OOB controller.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `password` (String) Password for authenticating to OOB controller.
- `username` (String) Username for authenticating to OOB controller.

### Optional

- `job_name` (String) For `command=DeleteJob` command, the name of the job to delete.
- `proxy_slot_number` (Number) For proxied inband requests, the slot number of the IOM. Only applies if `baseuri` is a proxy server.
- `timeout` (Number) Timeout in seconds for URL requests to OOB controller.
- `update_image_path` (String) For `command=FWUpload`, the path on the local filesystem of the firmware update image.

### Read-Only

- `jobUri` (String) URI to use to monitor status of the operation. Returned for async commands such as Firmware Update, Firmware Activate.
- `msg` (String) Message with action result or error description.
- `operationStatusId` (Number) OCAPI State ID (see OCAPI documentation for possible values).
